subcodes.first_line: O ye my dear friends! Your letter was received and its contents were wonderful and beautiful for it evinced the spreading of the light of Guidance.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عزیز من نامه شما رسید و مضمون بسیار ملیح و بدیع بود زیرا دلالت بر انتشار
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @call to action
